summary: Iteration 19: Conversational AI Features testing complete. All 13 features tested - Backend 100% pass (8/8), Frontend 100% pass (all UI elements verified)

owner_ai_empty_state.verified: Empty state UI renders with suggestions and 'Generate Business Analysis' button

owner_ai_generate_analysis.verified: Clicking 'Generate Business Analysis' returns structured AI response with next_steps array

owner_ai_question_input.verified: Typing a question and clicking Ask AI sends question and returns focused response

owner_ai_next_steps_clickable.verified: 'Next Steps' buttons are clickable and auto-populate the input field

owner_ai_delete_cards.verified: Response cards can be deleted by hovering and clicking X

manager_staff_breakdown_columns.verified: Staff breakdown table shows WAGES, TIPS, and TOTAL columns

manager_ai_empty_state.verified: AI section shows empty state with suggestions and 'Analyze This Shift' button

manager_ai_analyze_shift.verified: Clicking 'Analyze This Shift' returns AI response with next_steps array and classification

manager_ai_enter_sends.verified: Typing question in AI input and pressing Enter sends question

manager_ai_next_steps_clickable.verified: 'Next Steps' buttons are clickable and auto-populate input

backend_staff_costs_fields.verified: Returns staff with wages, tips, total fields

context_for_next_testing_agent: Conversational AI features fully working. Owner AI returns insights with mandatory next_steps array (3-5 follow-up questions). Manager Shift AI returns insight with next_steps and classification badge (healthy/tight/underperforming). Staff costs table shows WAGES, TIPS, TOTAL columns - Tips is placeholder ($0) as tip-splitting is future task. AI calls use REAL GPT-5.2 via emergentintegrations - takes 10-30 seconds.
mocked_api_note: Tips field in staff breakdown is a placeholder (always $0) — tip-splitting logic is a future task
